meaning: Video Home System 家用录像系统
examples: The VHS player brought movies to people who'd stopped going to movies.
The VHS format won the competition. Betamax disappeared from all but professional use.
Bringing movies into the home via television, VHS and DVD built the industry into what it is today.
Sony engineers invented Betamax, only to see the cheaper VHS become the standard for videocassette recorders.
Remember those days when you just couldn't find a VHS tape to save your life?
